parameters.query:
SELECT id, webhook_secret
FROM caiac.clients
WHERE slug = '{{ $json.body.client_id }}'
LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ timestamp: $('Receive Ingest Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-timestamp'], signature: $('Receive Ingest Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-signature'], signing_key: $('Receive Ingest Request').item.json.headers.authorization.replace('Bearer ', '').trim(), secret: $input.first().json.webhook_secret }) }}

parameters.query:
SELECT s.user_id, s.role, s.client_id, s.expires_at,
       u.name, u.email, u.active as user_active, u.is_caiac_staff,
       c.slug, c.active as client_active
FROM caiac.sessions s
JOIN caiac.users u ON s.user_id = u.id
JOIN caiac.clients c ON s.client_id = c.id
WHERE s.token = '{{ $('Check HMAC Valid').item.json.token }}'
AND s.expires_at > NOW()
AND u.active = true
AND c.active = true
LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ pdf_base64: $('Receive Ingest Request').item.json.body.file_base64, title: $('Receive Ingest Request').item.json.body.filename.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '').replace(/_/g, ' '), chunk_size: 450, overlap: 75, min_tokens: 40 }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO caiac.documents (client_id, filename, role, uploaded_by, uploaded_at, chunks_indexed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Aggregate Points').item.json.client_id }}',
  '{{ $('Aggregate Points').item.json.filename }}',
  '{{ $('Aggregate Points').item.json.role }}',
  '{{ $('Aggregate Points').item.json.user_id }}',
  NOW(),
  {{ $('Aggregate Points').item.json.count }}
)

parameters.jsCode:
const aggregateResult = $('Aggregate Points').first().json;
return [{ json: { chunks_indexed: aggregateResult.count, filename: aggregateResult.filename } }];
